nasb.text: The elders of Gilead said to Jephthah, “The Lord is witness between us; surely we will do as you have said.”

esv.text: And the elders of Gilead said to Jephthah, “The Lord will be witness between us, if we do not do as you say.”

cnv.text: 基列的長老對耶弗他說：“有耶和華在我們中間作證，我們必定照著你的話行。”

ccb.text: 基列的首领们说：“我们必听从你的吩咐，有耶和华为我们作证。”
